---
title: 'RTNN: Accelerating Neighbor Search Using Hardware Ray Tracing'
author:
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- visual_computing_systems
url_source: https://dl.acm.org/doi/pdf/10.1145/3503221.3508409
talk_source: https://speakerdeck.com/queeten/rtnn-accelerating-neighbor-search-using-hardware-ray-tracing
code_source: https://github.com/horizon-research/rtnn
journ: PPoPP
year: 2022
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
pub_number: 56
---
